Interface AsyncApiMessage

All Superinterfaces:
Node, Visitable
All Known Subinterfaces:
AsyncApi20Message, AsyncApi21Message, AsyncApi22Message, AsyncApi23Message, AsyncApi24Message, AsyncApi25Message, AsyncApi26Message, AsyncApi2xMessage, AsyncApi30Message, AsyncApi31Message, AsyncApi3xMessage
All Known Implementing Classes:
AsyncApi20MessageImpl, AsyncApi21MessageImpl, AsyncApi22MessageImpl, AsyncApi23MessageImpl, AsyncApi24MessageImpl, AsyncApi25MessageImpl, AsyncApi26MessageImpl, AsyncApi30MessageImpl, AsyncApi31MessageImpl
public interface AsyncApiMessage extends Node
